source_pr.title: sessionctx, types, executor: support encoding and decoding user-defined variables
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #35288

Problem Summary:
This prepares for the session manager: to encode and decode user-defined variables.
It won't affect the user, so it won't be documented.

### What is changed and how it works?

- Marshal and unmarshal Datum, Time, and MyDecimal, which are used in user variables.
- Add `EncodeSessionStates` and `DncodeSessionStates` to `Session`.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: + // Use the testSerialSuite to fix the unstable test
failure_signature: + // Use the testSerialSuite to fix the unstable test
root_cause_explanation: The patch notes an unstable executor test setup due to shared/global state: some tests need to mutate global configuration (e.g., `Security.SkipGrantTable`) and are sensitive to suite ordering/parallelism. The stabilization is to isolate the setup into a dedicated suite/bootstrapping path and to restore global config, and to run the previously unstable test (`TestDropPartitionStats`) under a serial suite to reduce shared-state interference.
fix_pattern: Stabilize suite setup by isolating tests that mutate global config (restore after use) and running the previously unstable case under a serial suite to reduce shared-state interference.

evidence: evidence: + // Use the testSerialSuite to fix the unstable test

files: executor/executor_test.go, executor/show.go, executor/simple.go, executor/simple_test.go, session/session.go, sessionctx/context.go, sessionctx/session_states/session_states.go, sessionctx/session_states/session_states_test.go, sessionctx/sessionstates/session_states.go, sessionctx/sessionstates/session_states_test.go, sessionctx/variable/session.go, types/datum.go, types/datum_test.go, types/mydecimal.go, types/mydecimal_test.go, types/time.go, types/time_test.go, util/mock/context.go
